name: native-codex-loop
description: Lean long-task execution using native Codex planning, conditional read-only scouts, evidence-driven implementation, and final review.

interface.shortDescription: Lean native workflow for complex implementation
interface.longDescription: Complete complex Codex implementation tasks with one Root writer, native plan state, conditional read-only scouts, evidence-driven replanning, tests, Git checkpoints, and final native review.
defaultPrompt: Use $native-codex-loop to complete this long implementation with conditional exploration and native review.
Use $native-codex-loop with Goal to carry this multi-phase refactor across compaction.
